1: In the city of our God, in in the mountain of his holiness.
2: The city of the great King.
3: God is known in her palaces for a refuge.
5: They were troubled, and and hasted away.
6: And And pain, as of a woman in travail.
8: God will establish it for ever. Selah. Selah.
9: In the midst of thy temple.
10: Thy right hand is full of righteousness.
11: Let the daughters of Judah be glad, because of thy judgments.
13: That ye may tell it it to the generation following.
14: He will be our guide even even unto death.
